work_unit: moni-core config.rs: add soft upper-bound warnings for absurd fee/ratio magnitudes (MC-004)
situation: audit-2026-07-07-028 finding MC-004 pending dispatch. validate() rejects negatives and ratios >1.0 but not absurd magnitudes (commission_rate=0.99, initial_cash=1e18 pass). Defense-in-depth gap. Last derived_fix of audit-028 cycle.
action: Added tracing::warn! soft warnings at end of Config::validate() for 7 suspect ranges: account.initial_cash>1e15, fees.commission_rate>0.5, fees.stamp_duty_rate>0.1, fees.transfer_fee_rate>0.1, risk.lot_size>1M, data.qlib.default_batch_limit>1M, monitor.settlement_check_interval_seconds>86400. Warn-only (not reject) to preserve legitimate edge-case configs while surfacing likely unit errors in logs. Added `use tracing::warn;` import (tracing already a workspace dep of moni-core). Used Stack-on-diverged-wt escape hatch: opt-moni-core-1783359735 cp-guard blocked main→wt copy (MC-003 prior commit diverged config.rs), so edited worktree file directly + committed inside wt.
direction: route-fix (reused existing moni-core worktree per opt-worktree.sh auto-judge; config.rs not in public-interfaces.txt despite audit labeling direction-shift)
outcome_evidence: Commit d7dbc25 on auto/opt-moni-core-1783359735 pushed to origin (b87e287..d7dbc25). Code review URL: https://code.alibaba-inc.com/xtool/moni/codereview/new?from=master&to=auto/opt-moni-core-1783359735. Diff: +48 lines / -0 lines, single file.
